title: BramPack
description: A vanilla tweaked minecraft to make survival a lot cleaner, smoother en some nice tools :D
body:
BramPack – Vanilla+ With a Twist

Welcome to BramPack, a carefully curated modpack designed to give you that classic Minecraft experience — but enhanced with subtle, smart upgrades. Built with love for survival players, builders, and content creators, this pack adds quality-of-life features and performance boosts without ever losing that vanilla feel. No OP cheats, no overkill — just the good stuff.

Whether you’re grinding in Hardcore, building your dream base, or filming cinematic shots — BramPack has your back.

💡 Key Features:

Quality of Life mods to streamline your gameplay (better inventory, tooltips, minimaps, and more)

Fully balanced – no overpowered content that breaks the game

Creator-friendly: includes tools like Camera Utils, ReplayMod, or similar cinematic mods (if compatible)

Boosted performance via mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight (where available)

Built for Minecraft 1.21.1 — smooth, stable, and future-ready

📦 HOW TO INSTALL:

Download the Modrinth App (modrinth.com)

Search for BramPack

Click install

Launch the instance, tweak your settings/keybinds, and enjoy!

🧠 Recommended Specs:
Allocate at least 6–8GB of RAM for optimal performance — especially if you plan to use cinematic mods like Flashback or ReplayMod.

⚠️ Heads up: Some mods like Flashback may have conflicts with Essential. If you’re not actively using Essential features, feel free to disable it for better compatibility.

Got feedback or mod suggestions? Hit me up on Discord or socials — I’m always open to improving the experience.

Enjoy the game — your way.
– WhiteDocs
